title: phlox gracilis var. humilior
intro: Phlox gracilis var. humilior is a lesser-known variety of the phlox plant species, often referred to as a low-growing perennial herb. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and soothing respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as used in ointments and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
